action.reasoning: Observation: Training ran ~78 min but crashed due to numpy float32 JSON serialization. Only the pretrained checkpoint exists - no fine-tuned model was saved. Analysis: Need to fix the JSON bug (cast numpy types to Python float), add robust checkpoint saving, and retrain. Also should add AMP for speed. Decision: Rewrite complete train.py with all fixes, train for ~20 epochs, and submit eval.
